white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-ireg-brustimplantat-meldung-definitions.html#ireg-brustimplantat-meldung" title="Logisches Modell der GEMeldung fuer Brustimplantate gemaess IRegD XML-Spezifikation V4.1.1.

Dieses Modell bildet die Hierarchie der XML-Nachricht ab, beschraenkt auf den
Brustimplantat-Anteil (ohne Endoprothese und Aortenklappe). Es dient als
StructureMap-Target fuer die Erzeugung von IRegG-XML-Meldungen aus FHIR-Ressourcen.

Mapping-Uebersicht:
- Meldung (MEL_*) -&gt; MessageHeader + Organization
- Fall (FAL_*) -&gt; Encounter
- PatientenaufnahmeBrustimplantat (PAT_* + PAB_*) -&gt; Patient + Observations
- Operation (OPE_* + OBI_*) -&gt; Procedure
- Artikelidentifikation (ARI_* + ARB_* + ABI_*) -&gt; Device
- Zubehoer (ZUB_* + ZBI_*) -&gt; Device
- Entlassung (ENT_* + DBI_*) -&gt; Encounter.hospitalization + Condition">ireg-brustimplantat-meldung</a><a name="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">*</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a href="http://build.fhir.org/types.html#Base">Base</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">IRegG Brustimplantat Meldung (Logical Model)</td></tr>

<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck0010.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_blank.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_blank.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_primitive.png" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Primitive Data Type" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-ireg-brustimplantat-meldung-definitions.html#ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.entlassung.grundSchluessel" title="Entlassungs-/Verlegungsgrund (2-stellig, [0-9]{2})">grundSchluessel</a><a name="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.entlassung.grundSchluessel"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">0..1</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a href="http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/datatypes.html#string">string</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">ENT_GrundSchluessel</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck0001.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_blank.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_blank.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_datatype.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Data Type" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-ireg-brustimplantat-meldung-definitions.html#ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.entlassung.diagnoseBrustimplantat" title="Brustimplantat-spezifische Entlassungsdiagnose (ICD-10-GM)">diagnoseBrustimplantat</a><a name="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.entlassung.diagnoseBrustimplantat"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">0..*</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a href="http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/datatypes.html#BackboneElement">BackboneElement</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">DiagnoseBrustimplantat<br/></td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck00000.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_blank.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_blank.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_blank.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_primitive.png" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Primitive Data Type" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-ireg-brustimplantat-meldung-definitions.html#ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.entlassung.diagnoseBrustimplantat.icdSchluessel" title="ICD-10-GM Kode (Format: [a-zA-Z][0-9]{2}(.[0-9]{1,2})?(:[RLB])?)">icdSchluessel</a><a name="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.entlassung.diagnoseBrustimplantat.icdSchluessel"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">1..1</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a href="http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/datatypes.html#string">string</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">DBI_IcdSchluessel</td></tr>
<tr><td colspan="5" class="hierarchy"><br/><a href="https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/ig-guidance/readingIgs.html#table-views" title="Legend for this format"><img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABAAAAAQCAYAAAAf8/9hAAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAAACXBIWXMAAAsTAAALEwEAmpwYAAAAB3RJTUUH3goXBCwdPqAP0wAAAldJREFUOMuNk0tIlFEYhp9z/vE2jHkhxXA0zJCMitrUQlq4lnSltEqCFhFG2MJFhIvIFpkEWaTQqjaWZRkp0g26URZkTpbaaOJkDqk10szoODP//7XIMUe0elcfnPd9zsfLOYplGrpRwZaqTtw3K7PtGem7Q6FoidbGgqHVy/HRb669R+56zx7eRV1L31JGxYbBtjKK93cxeqfyQHbehkZbUkK20goELEuIzEd+dHS+qz/Y8PTSif0FnGkbiwcAjHaU1+QWOptFiyCLp/LnKptpqIuXHx6rbR26kJcBX3yLgBfnd7CxwJmflpP2wUg0HIAoUUpZBmKzELGWcN8nAr6Gpu7tLU/CkwAaoKTWRSQyt89Q8w6J+oVQkKnBoblH7V0PPvUOvDYXfopE/SJmALsxnVm6LbkotrUtNowMeIrVrBcBpaMmdS0j9df7abpSuy7HWehwJdt1lhVwi/J58U5beXGAF6c3UXLycw1wdFklArBn87xdh0ZsZtArghBdAA3+OEDVubG4UEzP6x1FOWneHh2VDAHBAt80IbdXDcesNoCvs3E5AFyNSU5nbrDPZpcUEQQTFZiEVx+51fxMhhyJEAgvlriadIJZZksRuwBYMOPBbO3hePVVqgEJhFeUuFLhIPkRP6BQLIBrmMenujm/3g4zc398awIe90Zb5A1vREALqneMcYgP/xVQWlG+Ncu5vgwwlaUNx+3799rfe96u9K0JSDXcOzOTJg4B6IgmXfsygc7/Bvg9g9E58/cDVmGIBOP/zT8Bz1zqWqpbXIsd0O9hajXfL6u4BaOS6SeWAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" alt="doco" style="background-color: inherit"/> Documentation for this format</a></td></tr></table></div>
  </text>
  <url
       value="https://www.senologie.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ireg-brustimplantat-meldung"/>
  <version value="0.1.0"/>
  <name value="IRegBrustimplantatMeldung"/>
  <title value="IRegG Brustimplantat Meldung (Logical Model)"/>
  <status value="draft"/>
  <date value="2026-05-04T06:23:23+00:00"/>
  <publisher value="Berlin Institute of Health at Charité (BIH)"/>
  <contact>
    <name value="Berlin Institute of Health at Charité (BIH)"/>
    <telecom>
      <system value="url"/>
      <value value="https://www.bihealth.org"/>
    </telecom>
  </contact>
  <description
               value="Logisches Modell der GEMeldung fuer Brustimplantate gemaess IRegD XML-Spezifikation V4.1.1.

Dieses Modell bildet die Hierarchie der XML-Nachricht ab, beschraenkt auf den
Brustimplantat-Anteil (ohne Endoprothese und Aortenklappe). Es dient als
StructureMap-Target fuer die Erzeugung von IRegG-XML-Meldungen aus FHIR-Ressourcen.

Mapping-Uebersicht:
- Meldung (MEL_*) -&gt; MessageHeader + Organization
- Fall (FAL_*) -&gt; Encounter
- PatientenaufnahmeBrustimplantat (PAT_* + PAB_*) -&gt; Patient + Observations
- Operation (OPE_* + OBI_*) -&gt; Procedure
- Artikelidentifikation (ARI_* + ARB_* + ABI_*) -&gt; Device
- Zubehoer (ZUB_* + ZBI_*) -&gt; Device
- Entlassung (ENT_* + DBI_*) -&gt; Encounter.hospitalization + Condition"/>
  <fhirVersion value="4.0.1"/>
  <kind value="logical"/>
  <abstract value="false"/>
  <type
        value="https://www.senologie.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ireg-brustimplantat-meldung"/>
  <baseDefinition value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Base"/>
  <derivation value="specialization"/>
  <snapshot>
    <extension
               url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/snapshot-base-version">
      <valueString value="4.0.1"/>
    </extension>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung"/>
      <short value="IRegG Brustimplantat Meldung (Logical Model)"/>
      <definition
                  value="Logisches Modell der GEMeldung fuer Brustimplantate gemaess IRegD XML-Spezifikation V4.1.1.

Dieses Modell bildet die Hierarchie der XML-Nachricht ab, beschraenkt auf den
Brustimplantat-Anteil (ohne Endoprothese und Aortenklappe). Es dient als
StructureMap-Target fuer die Erzeugung von IRegG-XML-Meldungen aus FHIR-Ressourcen.

Mapping-Uebersicht:
- Meldung (MEL_*) -&gt; MessageHeader + Organization
- Fall (FAL_*) -&gt; Encounter
- PatientenaufnahmeBrustimplantat (PAT_* + PAB_*) -&gt; Patient + Observations
- Operation (OPE_* + OBI_*) -&gt; Procedure
- Artikelidentifikation (ARI_* + ARB_* + ABI_*) -&gt; Device
- Zubehoer (ZUB_* + ZBI_*) -&gt; Device
- Entlassung (ENT_* + DBI_*) -&gt; Encounter.hospitalization + Condition"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Base"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <isModifier value="false"/>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung"/>
      <short value="Meldung"/>
      <definition value="Meldungskopf einer GEMeldung"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ele-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="All FHIR elements must have a @value or children"/>
        <expression
                    value="hasValue() or (children().count() &gt; id.count())"/>
        <xpath value="@value|f:*|h:div"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.id">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.id"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <short value="Unique id for inter-element referencing"/>
      <definition
                  value="Unique id for the element within a resource (for internal references). This may be any string value that does not contain spaces."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Element.id"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <extension
                   url="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-fhir-type">
          <valueUrl value="string"/>
        </extension>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/fhirpath/System.String"/>
      </type>
      <isModifier value="false"/>
      <isSummary value="false"/>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="rim"/>
        <map value="n/a"/>
      </mapping>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.extension">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.extension"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="url"/>
        </discriminator>
        <description value="Extensions are always sliced by (at least) url"/>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <short value="Additional content defined by implementations"/>
      <definition
                  value="May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance  applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension."/>
      <comment
               value="There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone."/>
      <alias value="extensions"/>
      <alias value="user content"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Element.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="Extension"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ele-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="All FHIR elements must have a @value or children"/>
        <expression
                    value="hasValue() or (children().count() &gt; id.count())"/>
        <xpath value="@value|f:*|h:div"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"/>
      </constraint>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ext-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="Must have either extensions or value[x], not both"/>
        <expression value="extension.exists() != value.exists()"/>
        <xpath
               value="exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), &quot;value&quot;)])"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"/>
      </constraint>
      <isModifier value="false"/>
      <isSummary value="false"/>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="rim"/>
        <map value="n/a"/>
      </mapping>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.modifierExtension">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.modifierExtension"/>
      <short value="Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized"/>
      <definition
                  value="May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element and that modifies the understanding of the element in which it is contained and/or the understanding of the containing element's descendants. Usually modifier elements provide negation or qualification. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension. Applications processing a resource are required to check for modifier extensions.

Modifier extensions SHALL NOT change the meaning of any elements on Resource or DomainResource (including cannot change the meaning of modifierExtension itself)."/>
      <comment
               value="There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone."/>
      <requirements
                    value="Modifier extensions allow for extensions that *cannot* be safely ignored to be clearly distinguished from the vast majority of extensions which can be safely ignored.  This promotes interoperability by eliminating the need for implementers to prohibit the presence of extensions. For further information, see the [definition of modifier extensions](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extensibility.html#modifierExtension)."/>
      <alias value="extensions"/>
      <alias value="user content"/>
      <alias value="modifiers"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="BackboneElement.modifierExtension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="Extension"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ele-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="All FHIR elements must have a @value or children"/>
        <expression
                    value="hasValue() or (children().count() &gt; id.count())"/>
        <xpath value="@value|f:*|h:div"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"/>
      </constraint>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ext-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="Must have either extensions or value[x], not both"/>
        <expression value="extension.exists() != value.exists()"/>
        <xpath
               value="exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), &quot;value&quot;)])"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"/>
      </constraint>
      <isModifier value="true"/>
      <isModifierReason
                        value="Modifier extensions are expected to modify the meaning or interpretation of the element that contains them"/>
      <isSummary value="true"/>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="rim"/>
        <map value="N/A"/>
      </mapping>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.idEinrichtung">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.idEinrichtung"/>
      <short value="MEL_IrdIdGesundheitseinrichtung"/>
      <definition value="IRD-GE-Kennung (Format: IRD-GE-[0-9]{8})"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.idEinrichtung"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.standortId">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.standortId"/>
      <short value="MEL_StandortId"/>
      <definition value="Standort-ID"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.standortId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.bsnr">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.bsnr"/>
      <short value="MEL_Bsnr"/>
      <definition value="Betriebsstaettennummer (BSNR)"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.bsnr"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.irdSpezVersion">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.irdSpezVersion"/>
      <short value="MEL_IrdSpezVersion"/>
      <definition value="Version der IRD-Spezifikation (Format: N.N.N)"/>
      <min value="1"/>

  </snapshot>
  <differential>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung"/>
      <short value="IRegG Brustimplantat Meldung (Logical Model)"/>
      <definition
                  value="Logisches Modell der GEMeldung fuer Brustimplantate gemaess IRegD XML-Spezifikation V4.1.1.

Dieses Modell bildet die Hierarchie der XML-Nachricht ab, beschraenkt auf den
Brustimplantat-Anteil (ohne Endoprothese und Aortenklappe). Es dient als
StructureMap-Target fuer die Erzeugung von IRegG-XML-Meldungen aus FHIR-Ressourcen.

Mapping-Uebersicht:
- Meldung (MEL_*) -&gt; MessageHeader + Organization
- Fall (FAL_*) -&gt; Encounter
- PatientenaufnahmeBrustimplantat (PAT_* + PAB_*) -&gt; Patient + Observations
- Operation (OPE_* + OBI_*) -&gt; Procedure
- Artikelidentifikation (ARI_* + ARB_* + ABI_*) -&gt; Device
- Zubehoer (ZUB_* + ZBI_*) -&gt; Device
- Entlassung (ENT_* + DBI_*) -&gt; Encounter.hospitalization + Condition"/>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung"/>
      <short value="Meldung"/>
      <definition value="Meldungskopf einer GEMeldung"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.idEinrichtung">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.idEinrichtung"/>
      <short value="MEL_IrdIdGesundheitseinrichtung"/>
      <definition value="IRD-GE-Kennung (Format: IRD-GE-[0-9]{8})"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.standortId">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.standortId"/>
      <short value="MEL_StandortId"/>
      <definition value="Standort-ID"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.bsnr">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.bsnr"/>
      <short value="MEL_Bsnr"/>
      <definition value="Betriebsstaettennummer (BSNR)"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.irdSpezVersion">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.irdSpezVersion"/>
      <short value="MEL_IrdSpezVersion"/>
      <definition value="Version der IRD-Spezifikation (Format: N.N.N)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.swName">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.swName"/>
      <short value="MEL_SwName"/>
      <definition value="Name der Software (max. 120 Zeichen)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.swHersteller">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.swHersteller"/>
      <short value="MEL_SwHersteller"/>
      <definition value="Name des Software-Herstellers (max. 120 Zeichen)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.swVersion">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.meldung.swVersion"/>
      <short value="MEL_SwVersion"/>
      <definition value="Version der Software (max. 120 Zeichen)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall"/>
      <short value="Fall"/>
      <definition value="Behandlungsfall"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.aufnahmedatum">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.aufnahmedatum"/>
      <short value="FAL_Aufnahmedatum"/>
      <definition value="Aufnahmedatum"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="date"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.artAufenthaltSchluessel">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.artAufenthaltSchluessel"/>
      <short value="FAL_ArtAufenthaltSchluessel"/>
      <definition value="Art des Aufenthalts (enum_0065)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.transfernummer">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.transfernummer"/>
      <short value="FAL_Transfernummer"/>
      <definition
                  value="Transfernummer der Vertrauensstelle (64-stellig, [a-z0-9]{64})"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.datumZeitSatzErstellung">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.datumZeitSatzErstellung"/>
      <short value="FAL_DatumZeitSatzErstellung"/>
      <definition value="Zeitstempel der Datensatzerstellung"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="dateTime"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.versionsnummer">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.versionsnummer"/>
      <short value="FAL_Versionsnummer"/>
      <definition value="Versionsnummer des Datensatzes (max. 10 Zeichen)"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.ausloeser">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.ausloeser"/>
      <short value="Ausloeser"/>
      <definition value="Ausloesende OPS-Prozedur"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.ausloeser.prozedurenSchluessel">
      <path
            value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.ausloeser.prozedurenSchluessel"/>
      <short value="ALR_ProzedurenSchluessel"/>
      <definition value="OPS-Kode, z.B. 5-870.a1"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.patientenaufnahme">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.patientenaufnahme"/>
      <short value="Patientenaufnahme"/>
      <definition
                  value="Demografische und klinische Patientendaten bei Aufnahme"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.patientenaufnahme.alter">
      <path value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.patientenaufnahme.alter"/>
      <short value="PAT_Alter"/>
      <definition value="Alter in Jahren"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="integer"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.patientenaufnahme.groesse">
      <path
            value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.patientenaufnahme.groesse"/>
      <short value="PAT_Groesse"/>
      <definition value="Koerpergroesse in cm"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="integer"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.patientenaufnahme.gewicht">
      <path
            value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.patientenaufnahme.gewicht"/>
      <short value="PAT_Gewicht"/>
      <definition value="Koerpergewicht in kg"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="integer"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.patientenaufnahme.geschlechtSchluessel">
      <path
            value="ireg-brustimplantat-meldung.fall.patientenaufnahme.geschlechtSchluessel"/>
